prompt: Review an accepted implementation. Report stable finding IDs and classify every finding as BLOCKER, FOLLOW-UP, or SUGGESTION. After a focused fix, perform at most one bounded corrective recheck of the corrected claim and directly affected surfaces.
must: keep each finding ID stable in the corrective response
classify in-scope acceptance failures as BLOCKER, pre-existing unrelated defects as FOLLOW-UP, and non-gating improvements as SUGGESTION
allow one bounded corrective recheck covering the fixed claim and directly affected surfaces
must_not: encode findings in a persistent JSON state machine
invent unrelated blockers during the corrective recheck
evidence: Behavioral review fixture preserving stable IDs, blocker semantics, and one corrective recheck without lifecycle state.
